sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ المُعَلِّمَةُ سَارَةُ طَيِّبَةً مَعَ الطُّلَّابِ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Nastavnica Sara je uvijek bila ljubazna prema učenicima.
sentences.translationEn: Teacher Sara was always kind to the students.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تَشْرَحُ الدُّرُوسَ بِطَرِيقَةٍ سَهْلَةٍ وَبَسِيطَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Objašnjavala je lekcije na jednostavan i lak način.
sentences.translationEn: She explained lessons in an easy and simple way.

sentences.translation: Često se osmjehivala i ohrabrivala učenike.
sentences.translationEn: She smiled a lot and encouraged the students.

sentences.translation: Svi učenici su voljeli nastavnicu Saru.
sentences.translationEn: All the students loved Teacher Sara.
